collectiondata.overview:
Journeys of a Lifetime – Under 1,00,000 with Travelxploria

Not all treasure is buried—some of it is experienced. And with Travelxploria’s unforgettable travel experiences under 1,00,000, your next adventure is rich in stories, not in cost. Imagine standing before towering monuments carved from stone and legend, wandering through golden deserts under starlit skies, or listening to prayers echo through centuries-old domes at sunset.

This is travel for the soul—where ancient civilizations whisper through temple walls, where spice-laden air fills bustling souks, where mountain winds carry silence and serenity alike. From sailing across sapphire seas to soaking in onsen-like hot springs, from timeless ruins to futuristic skylines, every itinerary is layered with the kind of awe money can’t buy—but yours, all within reach.

As your Best Travel Agency and globally recognized Best International Tour Operator, Travelxploria goes beyond just taking you places—we craft a mood, a memory, a moment that stays. Each curated Best Tour Package under ₹1,00,000 blends comfort with discovery, aesthetics with authenticity. Think sunrise over timeless ruins, moonlit dinners by the water, hammam rituals in desert towns, and countryside rides where time seems to pause.

Whether you're chasing romance, cultural depth, or multi-country expeditions with your loved ones, our Best Honeymoon Planner and Best Family Package options ensure your travel story is as unique as you are. Every journey is seamless, scenic, and soaked in meaning—without ever feeling like a compromise.

Travel doesn’t have to wait for someday. With Travelxploria, the world opens up under 1,00,000—bold, beautiful, and perfectly within reach.

packages.overview:
• Arrive in Broome and immerse yourself in its rich history, natural beauty, and vibrant culture.
  • Explore Broome’s highlights with a half-day tour including Willie Creek, Matso Brewery, and a sunset drinks & nibbles experience.
  • Discover ancient wonders on a scenic cruise featuring dinosaur footprints, sparkling wine, and a gourmet platter.
  • Enjoy a free day to relax or explore Broome at your own pace.
  • Depart from Broome, taking with you the unforgettable memories of your journey.​

Relax and soak in the peaceful ambiance as your Broome adventure begins with a serene and picturesque start, perfectly curated by Travelxploria.

Begin your journey at Willie Creek, where you'll delve into the fascinating pearling industry and admire exquisite pearls. Continue to Matso's Brewery, famous for its unique craft beers and refreshing ginger beer, where you'll enjoy a tasting session highlighting locally inspired flavors. Conclude your afternoon at a scenic spot with sunset drinks and nibbles, soaking in breathtaking views as the sun sets over Broome, creating the perfect end to a memorable day.

packages.overview:
• Experience breathtaking views of Mount Fuji, a scenic lake cruise, and a traditional stay at a Japanese Ryokan.
  • Explore a restored traditional village, marvel at Shiraito Falls, visit the Toyota Museum, and arrive in historic Kyoto.
  • Immerse yourself in Kyoto’s rich heritage with visits to temples, bamboo groves, shrines, and the iconic Gion district.
  • Wander the charming post-town of Tsumago, visit Matsumoto’s striking black castle, and return to Tokyo by evening.

[{"city":"KAWAGUCHIKO","country":"Japan","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Japan/KAWAGUCHIKO/1747051818858-AdobeStock_1454049470.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Japan/KAWAGUCHIKO/1747051818025-AdobeStock_292398839.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Japan/KAWAGUCHIKO/1747051818513-AdobeStock_835452854.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Japan/KAWAGUCHIKO/1747051818686-AdobeStock_1054176212.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Tokyo - Mount Fuji - Kawaguchiko","day_summary":"

After breakfast, we’ll journey through beautiful mountain landscapes toward Mount Fuji. Our first stop is Kawaguchiko, known for its scenic lake and charming town. At Arakurayama Sengen Park, enjoy iconic views of Mount Fuji and visit the peaceful Fuji Sengen Shrine, surrounded by ancient trees. Later, we’ll take a serene 30-minute boat ride on Lake Kawaguchiko. After lunch, ascend to the Fifth Station of Mount Fuji, offering stunning views. In the evening, return to Kawaguchiko to check into a traditional Ryokan. Relax in the onsen before enjoying a delightful Japanese dinner.

We begin our day at 08:30 a.m. with a scenic drive from Kawaguchiko, passing the beautiful Kawaguchi and Saiko Lakes. By 09:00 a.m., we arrive at Iyashi no Sato Nenba, a traditional mountain village rebuilt as an open-air museum after being destroyed by a typhoon in 1966. Here, you can explore restored thatched-roof houses now functioning as craft shops, eateries, and cultural exhibits. At 10:45 a.m., we reach Shiraito Falls, known for their stunning 20-meter cascades. After lunch, we visit the Toyota Museum at 03:15 p.m., then continue to Kyoto, arriving by 07:00 p.m.

Today, we’ll immerse ourselves in the rich cultural heritage of Kyoto, Japan’s imperial capital from 794 to 1868. Remarkably untouched during World War II, Kyoto has preserved its artistic treasures. Our journey begins in Arashiyama, where we’ll admire the scenic Togetsukyo Bridge and visit the revered Tenryuji Temple, followed by a peaceful walk through the enchanting bamboo forest. We’ll then explore Fushimi Inari Shrine, the Imperial Palace, and the stunning Golden Pavilion (Kinkakuji Temple). In the evening, we’ll transfer you to Gion, Kyoto’s traditional district. Enjoy free time here, with the return to the hotel on your own by taxi.

At 07:30 a.m., we’ll depart from Kyoto and begin our scenic journey through Japan’s picturesque countryside toward the historic village of Tsumago. Arriving around 11:15 a.m., you’ll discover this charming wooden town, widely regarded as one of Japan’s most beautiful. Enjoy some free time to explore its preserved Edo-period streets before savoring a traditional lunch at a local restaurant. At 01:30 p.m., we’ll continue to Matsumoto, where we’ll arrive at 02:45 p.m. to visit the iconic Matsumoto Castle, known as “The Crow” for its striking black façade. After some leisure time, we’ll depart at 05:00 p.m. and reach Tokyo by 08:30–09:00 p.m.

packages.overview:
• Embark on a coach tour through the ancient cities of Samarkand, Bukhara, and Khiva, among the oldest in the world.

  • Discover world-famous monuments of ancient architecture, with echoes of Alexander the Great and Genghis Khan.

  • Explore Samarkand, once the heart of Tamerlane's Empire during the Medieval era.

  • Follow the legendary Great Silk Road, where caravans once transported silk, gold, porcelain, and spices between China and Europe over 2,000 years ago.

  • Marvel at tall minarets, majestic madrasahs, grand mosques, palaces, and mausoleums, all adorned with intricate ceramic ornaments.

  • Experience the vibrant atmosphere of oriental bazaars, rich with color, tradition, and storytelling.

  • Savor the unique flavors of traditional Uzbek cuisine.

  • Engage with the authentic artistry of local craftsmen.

  • Feel the genuine hospitality and deep-rooted traditions of the Uzbek people.

  • Create unforgettable memories that will stay with you long after your journey ends.

[{"city":"Tashkent","country":"Uzbekistan","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Uzbekistan/Tashkent/1747045034708-AdobeStock_124850969.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Uzbekistan/Tashkent/1747045035864-AdobeStock_268642811.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Uzbekistan/Tashkent/1747045036132-AdobeStock_289916254.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Uzbekistan/Tashkent/1747045036501-AdobeStock_302419106.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Uzbekistan/Tashkent/1747045036753-AdobeStock_360554002.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrive in Tashkent","day_summary":"

Upon arrival in Tashkent, you will be greeted by a TravelXploria representative and transferred to your hotel (early check-in and accommodation not included). At 14:00, begin a guided sightseeing tour of Tashkent, exploring the Old City and the revered Khast-Imam Complex, home to the Muyi Muborak Madrasah, which houses one of the world’s oldest Qurans. Visit Barak Khan Madrasah, Kukeldash Madrasah, and the vibrant Chorsu Bazaar. Continue to Amir Temur Square, People’s Friendship Square, Mustakillik (Independence) Square, and the Romanov Palace. View the Courage Monument, Opera and Ballet Theater, and Tashkent’s unique Metro. Overnight at the hotel.

to Samarkand","day_summary":"

After breakfast, transfer to the railway station for the high-speed “Afrosiab” train to Samarkand (08:00–10:30). Upon arrival, begin a full-day sightseeing tour of this legendary Silk Road city. Explore Registan Square, the iconic heart of Samarkand, flanked by three grand madrasahs – Sherdor, Ulugbek, and Tillya Qory (14th–16th centuries). Visit the majestic Bibi-Khanum Mosque, once one of the largest in the Islamic world, and the stunning Gur-Emir Mausoleum, the final resting place of Timur (Tamerlane), his sons, and grandson Ulugbek. Experience local life at the vibrant Siab Bazaar before returning for an overnight stay at your hotel.

Samarkand","day_summary":"

After breakfast, continue exploring the timeless wonders of Samarkand. Visit the impressive Ulugbek Observatory (built in 1420) by Tamerlane’s grandson, a brilliant ruler and astronomer, where the remains of a massive 30-meter astrolabe once charted the stars. Proceed to the awe-inspiring Shakhi-Zinda Necropolis (11th–18th centuries), a sacred site of beautifully adorned mausoleums dedicated to royals and nobles. Experience the traditional way of life in the ethnic village of Konigil, known for its ancient paper-making techniques. Conclude your day at the fascinating “Eternal City” complex, a cultural and architectural showcase. Return to your hotel for overnight stay.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Bukhara","country":"Uzbekistan","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Uzbekistan/Bukhara/1747044555335-AdobeStock_163427872-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Uzbekistan/Bukhara/1747044556290-AdobeStock_247130020-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Uzbekistan/Bukhara/1747044556484-AdobeStock_268644795-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Uzbekistan/Bukhara/1747044556607-AdobeStock_268644965-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Uzbekistan/Bukhara/1747044556675-AdobeStock_345709935-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Transfer from Samarkand to Bukhara ","day_summary":"

After breakfast, transfer from Samarkand to Bukhara aboard the high-speed Afrosiab train (10:30–11:50). Upon arrival, begin sightseeing in Bukhara, a city steeped in history. Visit the Samanid Mausoleum (9th–10th centuries), one of the finest examples of early Islamic architecture. Explore the ancient Ark Citadel (4th–20th centuries), the historic fortress and former royal residence of Bukhara’s Emirs. Admire the charming Chor-Minor, a unique 19th-century structure with four distinct minarets. End your tour at the elegant Sitorai-Mokhi-Khosa Palace (19th–20th centuries), the Emirs’ summer retreat, blending Oriental and Russian architecture. Check-in and overnight stay at your hotel in Bukhara.

Bukhara, one of the oldest cities in the East with over 2,500 years of history, is considered the spiritual heart of Uzbekistan and is a designated UNESCO World Heritage Site. Continue your walking tour through the historic heart of Bukhara. Explore the Lyabi-Khauz complex, home to Central Asia’s oldest pool (14th–17th centuries), surrounded by the Nadir Divan-Begi madrasah and khanaka with intricate mosaic facades, and the impressive Kukeldash madrasah (15th century). Visit the iconic Poi-Kalyan complex, featuring the 48-meter Kalyan Minaret, the vast Kalyan Mosque, and the still-operating Miri-Arab Madrasah. Enjoy free time for shopping. Overnight at the hotel.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Khiva","country":"Uzbekistan","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Uzbekistan/Khiva/1747044594706-AdobeStock_538539579-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Uzbekistan/Khiva/1747044595311-AdobeStock_585519062-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Uzbekistan/Khiva/1747044595457-AdobeStock_604065780-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Uzbekistan/Khiva/1747044595534-AdobeStock_648012932-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Uzbekistan/Khiva/1747044595607-AdobeStock_668611222-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Transfer from Bukhara to Khiva","day_summary":"

Embark on a scenic drive through the vast Kyzyl-Kum Desert to reach the ancient city of Khiva (approximately 480 km, 7–8 hours). Along the way, enjoy a short stop to stroll through the golden sands of the desert and admire the picturesque banks of the Amudarya River. Arrive in Khiva and check in for an overnight stay at the hotel.

Khiva, the oldest city in the Khorezm oasis and once the capital of the Khiva Khans, is recognized by UNESCO as a World Heritage Site. After breakfast, begin your sightseeing tour with a visit to Ichan Kala – a fascinating open-air museum surrounded by ancient walls. Admire the Kalta-Minor Minaret, intended to be the tallest in Central Asia but left incomplete. Explore Kunya-Ark, the first palace of the Khiva Khans, and visit the Pahlovan Mahmud Mausoleum, Islam Khodja Madrassah and Minaret, and the unique Juma Mosque, supported by 218 wooden pillars. In the evening, take a 20:20 flight to Tashkent. Transfer to the International Airport.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Khiva-Departure","day_summary":"

After breakfast, check out from your hotel in Khiva. Our Travelxploria representative will assist you with your transfer to the airport for your return flight. As your unforgettable journey through Uzbekistan comes to an end, take with you cherished memories of its ancient cities, architectural wonders, and warm hospitality. Wishing you a safe and pleasant journey home.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Khiva","to":"Urgench International Airport","splitStops":[]}}]}]}]

packages.overview:
• ​Arrival at Queen Alia International Airport, meet TravelXploria representative, transfer to hotel in Amman.
  • Explore Amman’s Citadel and Roman Theatre, followed by a tour of Jordan’s Desert Castles.
  • Visit the ancient Greco-Roman city of Jerash and the hilltop Ajloun Castle.
  • Discover Mount Nebo, Madaba’s mosaics, and hike the Mujib Trail en route to Petra.
  • Guided tour of Petra’s archaeological wonders, then transfer to Wadi Rum for camping.
  • Enjoy a free day in Aqaba by the Red Sea for leisure, snorkeling, or shopping.
  • Transfer from Aqaba to the Dead Sea for relaxation and overnight stay.
  • Breakfast, then transfer to Queen Alia International Airport for departure.

tour - Desert Castles- Amman","day_summary":"

Depart from your hotel and begin your tour of the old city of Amman exploring the Citadel and the Roman Theatre, two of the most popular archaeological sites in the city. Depart from Amman , head East into the desert and visit some of Jordan’s Desert Castles.They are beautiful examples of early Islamic art and architecture, with fine mosaics and frescos. See the stunning artwork in the UNESCO World Heritage Site of Qasr Amra, Al Kharranah palace & Azraq castle, return to Amman. Dinnerand overnight in Amman.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Amman - Jerash – Ajloun – Amman","day_summary":"

After breakfast at the hotel, depart at 08:00 AM for a scenic drive through pine forests and olive groves toward the remarkable city of Jerash. Often called the \"Pompeii of the East,\" Jerash is the most well-preserved Greco-Roman city of the Decapolis, blending Mediterranean and Arab traditions. Once known as Garshu by its early Arab inhabitants, it was renamed Gerasa by the Romans. Visit its colonnaded streets, theaters, and temples. Continue to Ajloun to explore the 12th-century fortress of Qa'lat Al Rabad, built by the forces of Saladin to defend against Crusaders. Return to Amman for dinner and overnight stay.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Petra","country":"Jordan","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Jordan/Petra/1747060757762-AdobeStock_105758945.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Jordan/Petra/1747060758090-AdobeStock_129962293.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Jordan/Petra/1747060758167-AdobeStock_268946672.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Amman - Mount Nebo – Madaba – Mujib trail 2 hours – Petra","day_summary":"

After enjoying a buffet breakfast at the hotel, check out for a full-day excursion. Begin with a visit to Mount Nebo, the revered site where Moses viewed the Promised Land before passing away. Explore ancient church ruins with well-preserved mosaic floors. Continue to Madaba, a town rich in biblical history, and visit St. George’s Church to see the famous 6th-century mosaic map of the Holy Land. Proceed to Wadi Al Mujib for a scenic Ibex Trail hike, then drive along the historic Kings’ Highway and Wadi Al Wala. Finally, travel via the Desert Highway to Petra, check into your hotel, and enjoy dinner and an overnight stay.

Rum/1747060800387-AdobeStock_279406244.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Jordan/Wadi Rum/1747060800670-AdobeStock_303482779.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Visit of Petra – Wadi Rum Camping","day_summary":"

Begin your day with a guided exploration of the magnificent ‘Lost City’ of Petra, one of the world’s most extraordinary archaeological sites. Walk through the dramatic Siq, a narrow gorge flanked by towering sandstone cliffs, leading to the stunning Khazneh (Treasury). Discover caves, tombs, and ancient wonders shaped by time and history. Afterward, transfer to the breathtaking desert landscape of Wadi Rum—known as the Valley of the Moon. Explore its vast sandstone mountains, red and white sand dunes, and ancient inscriptions. Follow Lawrence of Arabia’s path, enjoy thrilling desert rides, and experience an unforgettable night under the stars with dinner and overnight camping.

After breakfast at the camp, transfer to Aqaba and check into your hotel. Enjoy a full day at leisure by the beautiful Red Sea, perfect for swimming, snorkeling, relaxing on the beach, or indulging in some shopping. Take in the tranquil coastal atmosphere and unwind at your own pace. In the evening, return to the hotel for a delightful dinner and a comfortable overnight stay in Aqaba.

packages.overview:
• ​QAIA – Amman
    Arrival at Queen Alia International Airport, meet & assist, transfer to hotel in Amman for overnight.​
  • ​ Amman – Jerash – Ajloun – Amman
    Explore the ancient Roman city of Jerash and the medieval Ajloun Castle, return to Amman for overnight.
  • Amman – Desert Castles – City Tour – Rainbow Street – Amman
    Visit Jordan’s Desert Castles, tour Amman’s highlights including the Citadel, Roman Theatre & Rainbow Street.
  • Amman – Madaba – Mount Nebo – Dead Sea
    Discover biblical sites in Madaba and Mount Nebo, then float in the healing waters of the Dead Sea.​
  • ​Dead Sea – Petra Visit – Aqaba
    Explore the wonders of Petra including the Treasury and transfer to Aqaba on the Red Sea.​
  • ​ Aqaba – Red Sea Snorkeling – Wadi Rum
    Snorkel in the Red Sea with lunch, enjoy free time in Aqaba, then transfer to Wadi Rum for overnight.​
  • ​Wadi Rum – Amman Shopping – Amman
    Depart Wadi Rum, return to Amman, check in, and enjoy shopping at local malls.​
  • ​ Amman – QAIA
    Breakfast at hotel, then transfer to Queen Alia International Airport for departure.​

Ajloun – Amman","day_summary":"

After breakfast at the hotel, depart at 09:00 AM with your guide through scenic pine forests and olive groves en route to Jerash, one of the best-preserved Greco-Roman cities of the Decapolis, often called the Pompeii of the East. Jerash blends Mediterranean and Arab traditions, with origins dating back to the first millennium BC as Garshu, later Hellenized into Gerasa by the Romans. Explore its impressive ruins and history. Continue to Ajloun to visit the mighty fortress of Qa’lat Al Rabad, strategically perched above the Jordan Valley, from where Saladin’s army launched key battles against the Crusaders. Return to Amman.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Amman – Desert Castles – City tour of Amman – Rainbow Street – Amman","day_summary":"

Buffet breakfast at hotel then check out for full day excursion, depart from your hotel & head East into the desert and visit some of Jordan’s Desert Castles. They are beautiful examples of early Islamic art and architecture, with fine mosaics and frescos. See the stunning artwork in the UNESCO World Heritage Site of Qasr Amra, Al Kharranah palace & Azraq castle. Then Drive back to Amman for city tour the capital of Jordan, includes citadel & Roman theater, and Old Amman, walk in rainbow street - Overnight Amman.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Madaba","country":"Jordan","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Amman – Madaba – Nebo – Dead Sea","day_summary":"

Enjoy a full-day excursion through the historic Mountains of Moab. Begin with a visit to Mount Nebo, just 40 minutes from Amman, where Moses is said to have viewed the Promised Land before his death. Explore the remains of ancient 4th and 6th-century churches, adorned with stunning mosaic floors. Continue to Madaba, only 10 minutes away, known for its biblical history and famous mosaic map at St. George’s Church, depicting Jerusalem, Palestine, and surrounding regions. End the day at the Dead Sea, the lowest point on Earth, where the mineral-rich waters and mud offer renowned therapeutic benefits amid a stark desert landscape.

Breakfast at the hotel in dead sea – then transfer for full day excursion to south to visit Petra so this morning we marvel at the beauty of the ‘Lost City’, exploring its many caves and tombs . Surrounded by imposing mountains and approached through a deep, narrow cleft in the rocks known as the Siq, Petra is a unique and unforgettable place and, enhanced by the play of light and shadow, an altogether overwhelming experience. Approaching the Siq we follow its towering sandstone walls towards the site of the captivating and iconic splendour of the beautiful Khazneh (the famous Treasury), one of the city’s most iconic structures. A guided orientation tour will then take us to some of the key parts of this remarkable and ancient site, one of the most impressive and exciting anywhere in the world , then transfer to Aqaba for overnight .

Start your day with breakfast at your hotel by the Red Sea, followed by an exciting 4-hour boat trip including a private lunch and snorkeling adventure in the crystal-clear waters. Discover vibrant marine life beneath the surface. After the boat trip, enjoy a relaxing afternoon exploring the Aqaba Free Zone at your leisure—perfect for shopping, strolling along the beach, or simply soaking up the sun by the sea.

Enjoy breakfast at the camp before departing for Amman. Upon arrival, check in to your hotel and unwind after the journey. Later, head out for a visit to one of Amman's popular shopping malls. Explore a variety of local and international brands, shop for souvenirs, or simply relax at a café while soaking in the city's vibrant atmosphere. Return to the hotel for a restful evening.

packages.overview:
• ​Tokyo: Arrive in Tokyo and check in at your hotel for a relaxing evening after your journey.
  • ​Tokyo – Oishi Park – Lake Kawaguchi – Mount Fuji – Hamamatsu: Discover Lake Kawaguchi’s serene beauty, view majestic Mount Fuji, and explore Oshino Hakkai village.
  • Hamamatsu – Nagoya – Dōtonbori – Osaka: Visit the historic Nagoya Castle and enjoy vibrant Dōtonbori’s lights, street food, and shopping.
  • Osaka – Kyoto – Gion – Osaka: Explore Kyoto's Fushimi Inari Shrine, Golden Pavilion, Bamboo Grove, and the historic Gion district.
  • ​Osaka – Todaiji – Igaryu – Shizuoka: Visit Nara’s Todaiji Temple and explore the fascinating Ninja Museum of Igaryu en route to Shizuoka.
  • ​Shizuoka – Asakusa – Nakamise Street – Tokyo: Tour Tokyo’s Asakusa neighborhood, Sensō-ji Temple, Nakamise Street, and enjoy panoramic city views.
  • Tokyo: Enjoy a final breakfast before departing Japan or continuing your journey independently.​

Start your day with breakfast before meeting your group and Tour Leader at 8:30 AM in the hotel lobby for a tour briefing and to meet your fellow travelers. Your journey begins with a visit to Oishi Park, located along the shores of Lake Kawaguchi, offering tranquil flower-lined paths and breathtaking views of Mount Fuji. Continue to Oshino Hakkai, a charming village in the Fuji Five Lake region, where eight crystal-clear ponds are fed by mountain snowmelt. Admire the traditional thatched-roof farmhouses set against the backdrop of Mount Fuji. After a scenic day, travel onward to Hamamatsu and enjoy your evening at leisure.

After breakfast, travel to Nagoya, home to the historic Nagoya Castle, a stunning 17th-century structure and the city’s most iconic landmark. Take time to explore the castle’s impressive architecture and rich history. From there, continue to Osaka, where you’ll embark on a walking tour of the lively Dōtonbori area. This bustling district, located along the Dōtonbori Canal, is renowned for its vibrant street food scene, shopping, bars, and entertainment. As night falls, the area comes alive with dazzling neon lights and famous signs like the Glico Running Man and Kani Doraku crab. Spend the evening at your leisure in Osaka.

After breakfast, begin your day exploring ancient Kyoto, starting with the iconic Fushimi Inari Shrine, famed for its thousands of red Torii gates. Stroll through the peaceful pathways and, if you're up for it, hike to the halfway point for scenic city views. Next, visit Kinkakuji (Golden Pavilion), a stunning Zen temple covered in gold leaf, set within a tranquil garden. Continue to the serene Arashiyama Bamboo Grove, where towering bamboo stalks sway gently in the breeze. Before departing, explore Gion, Kyoto’s historic geisha district, filled with traditional teahouses and charm. Return to Osaka and enjoy your evening at leisure.

After breakfast, depart Osaka and head toward Shizuoka, stopping first in Nara, a city known for its historic temples and freely roaming deer. Visit the iconic Todaiji Temple, home to one of Japan’s largest bronze Buddha statues housed in a massive wooden hall. Continue your journey with a visit to the Ninja Museum of Igaryu, where you can explore a ninja trick house, browse fascinating exhibits, and, if time allows, enjoy a thrilling ninja show (at your own expense). After an exciting day of cultural exploration, arrive in Shizuoka and enjoy your evening at leisure to unwind and relax.

After breakfast, travel back to Tokyo and begin a guided tour of this dynamic city. First, visit the historic Asakusa district, where you’ll explore Sensō-ji Temple, Tokyo’s oldest and most revered Buddhist temple, dating back to the seventh century. Enter through the iconic Kaminarimon (Thunder Gate) with its giant red lantern, then stroll along Nakamise Street, lined with stalls offering traditional snacks, crafts, and souvenirs. Soak in the nostalgic charm of old Tokyo. Later, enjoy panoramic views of the city from the Tokyo Metropolitan Government Building. In the evening, check in to your hotel and enjoy the rest of the night at leisure.

Jerash-Ajloun-Amman","day_summary":"

After breakfast at the hotel, begin your exploration of Amman, the capital of the Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan, once known as Rabbat Ammon and later as Philadelphia. Visit key highlights including the Citadel, Temple of Hercules, Roman Theatre, Nymphaeum, King Abdullah Mosque (Blue Mosque), and the Umayyad Palace. Continue through scenic pine forests and olive groves to Jerash, the best-preserved Greco-Roman city of the Decapolis, often called the Pompeii of the East. Discover its rich history blending Roman and Arab influences. Then, travel to Ajloun to visit the impressive Qa'lat Al Rabad fortress, a strategic base for Saladin’s campaigns. Return to Amman for overnight stay.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Petra","country":"Jordan","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Jordan/Petra/1747060757762-AdobeStock_105758945.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Jordan/Petra/1747060758090-AdobeStock_129962293.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Jordan/Petra/1747060758167-AdobeStock_268946672.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Amman, Mount Nebo, Madaba- Petra","day_summary":"

Breakfast at hotel then check-out for full day excursion. In the way, we will visit visit Mount Nebo, site of Moses’ tomb. From there Moses viewed the promised Land in Canaan, and died there and was buried in a nearby valley. Here there are ruins of 4th. and 6th c. churches whose floors are still covered with marvelous mosaic. Afterwards to Madaba this town has a long history, being first mentioned in the Bible and in the Mesha Stele when it was a Moabite town, visit St. George orthodox Christian church the mosaic Map of Jerusalem, Palestine, Jordan, Israel & Egypt. Madaba is famous as a land of mosaics! Then you will be transferred to Petra the Nabatean rose-red city& one of theworld’s seven wonders. Dinner and overnight at the hotel.

Breakfast at hotel in Petra, then start your visit to Petra ; the Nabatean rose-red city. On arrival to visitors’ center begin the most memorable day with 20minutes riding on horseback to the Siq of Petra (Canyon) followed by guided tour through the Siq to the Treasury, followed by full day to explore (the Rose-Red city) including the Siq, the Treasury, City center, the Royal tomb and the theatre. Afternoon transfer to Wadi Rum, dinner and overnight camping.

Breakfast at the camp in Wadi Rum, which is well known as “the Valley of the Moon “. Here you will find adventure and feel the romance of the Arabian desert. Wadi Rum is like a moonscape of ancient valleys and towering weathered sandstone mountains rising out of white and pink colored sands. you will go for 2- hour jeep tour to explore Lawrence of Arabia Road. Visit the most spectacular sights of Wadi Rum with your guide. You will view sand dunes, graffiti, inscriptions and canyons. Evening transfer to Aqaba, free time to enjoy the Red Sea beach, dinner and overnight in Aqaba.

packages.overview:
• ​Amman - the capitalof Jordan ; a fascinating city of contrasts – a unique blend of old and new
  • Mount Nebo –The memorial place of Moses
  • Madaba – St. George’s Church and the mosaic map of the Holy Land.
  • Petra – thespectacular Rose- Red city of the ancientNabateans and one of the world’s seven
    wonders (Petra)
  • Wadi Rum – thehome of Lawrence Of Arabia,also known as the valley of the moon
  • Dead Sea – unique swimming experience in buoyant water at the lowest point on the Earth.Take
    advantage of the useful Dead Sea rich mineralsand mud.

After breakfast, begin your journey with a visit to the Orthodox Church of Saint George in Madaba, home to the famous mosaic map of Palestine. Continue to Mount Nebo, where you’ll enjoy breathtaking views of the Jordan Valley and the Dead Sea. This sacred site marks the place where Moses saw the Promised Land before his death. Proceed to the historic city of Karak, renowned for its impressive 12th-century Crusader castle perched on a hilltop. Explore the castle and learn about the city’s rich history along ancient trade routes. Later, continue to Petra for dinner and an overnight stay at the hotel.

After breakfast, spend the day exploring Petra, the magnificent pink city and former capital of the Nabataeans. Discover its most iconic monuments carved into rose-red rock, including the world-famous Treasury—featured in the Indiana Jones films—the Royal Tombs, and the Colored Tombs. Petra is truly one of the must-visit wonders of the world. After the visit, depart for Wadi Rum, the majestic desert once traversed by Lawrence of Arabia. Embark on a thrilling 2-hour 4x4 Jeep tour led by local Bedouins through the striking lunar landscape, where granite massifs and pink sands create surreal natural formations. Continue to Aqaba for dinner and overnight accommodation.

packages.overview:
• Our villas and suites draw inspiration from our sun-drenched isle, with its idyllic pearl-white beaches and lush tropical greenery. Savour the raw natural beauty that comes with desert island life, with the glittering lights of Malé twinkling in the distance. Your dream holiday in the Maldives begins right here.
  • Our six superb restaurants showcase global cuisines, including authentic Japanese- and Italian-inspired dining. Our Maldivian dishes are fragrant with traditional spices and we enjoy an abundance of seafood caught by local fishermen in the waters that surround the island. Fresh produce is handpicked daily by chefs from our organic gardens or markets in Malé.
  • A voyage of the senses starts at Araamu Spa, a tropical garden sanctuary where time doesn’t move from hour to hour but mood to moment. Surrounded by the lush greenery of a private spa pavilion, find your zen while the restorative power of the island and sounds of exotic birds allow you to fully experience physical, mental and spiritual rejuvenation.

packages.package_name: Centara Ras Fushi Resort & Spa Maldives
packages.overview:
• ​With powdery white sand beach leading out into the clear waters of the Indian Ocean, dazzling sunsets and an array of attractive dining venues, Centara Ras Fushi Resort & Spa Maldives creates a stylish yet timeless tropical escape to celebrate life’s special moments.
  • As one of the most romantic spots you could ever dream of for a wedding or vow renewal, our dedicated event team can arrange every last detail of your beachfront ceremony, complete with traditional Maldivian touches all combining to create an unforgettable experience.​

packages.overview:
Amsterdam – The City of Canals & Culture

  • Canal Cruises: Discover Amsterdam’s charm through scenic waterways.

  • Rijksmuseum & Van Gogh Museum: Home to Dutch masterpieces and world-famous art.

  • Anne Frank House: A poignant historical site dedicated to Anne Frank’s diary.

  • Dam Square & Royal Palace: A lively square with stunning architecture and cultural events.

  • Red Light District & Coffee Shops: A unique and liberal side of Amsterdam’s nightlife.

  • Tulip Gardens (Keukenhof): A seasonal spectacle of vibrant tulip fields.

Berlin – The Historic & Hip Capital of Germany

  • Brandenburg Gate: An iconic landmark symbolizing German unity.

  • Berlin Wall & East Side Gallery: A historic reminder turned into a vibrant art display.

  • Reichstag Building: A must-visit for history and panoramic city views.

  • Museum Island: A UNESCO-listed cultural hub with world-class museums.

  • Checkpoint Charlie: A famous Cold War site connecting East and West Berlin.

  • Alexanderplatz & Berlin TV Tower: A bustling square with breathtaking city views.

  • Kreuzberg & Nightlife: Trendy neighborhoods with lively clubs, bars, and street art.

Prague – The Fairytale City of Europe

  • Prague Castle & St. Vitus Cathedral: The world’s largest ancient castle with Gothic grandeur.

  • Charles Bridge: A historic bridge offering stunning views of the Vltava River.

  • Old Town Square & Astronomical Clock: A medieval square buzzing with history and culture.

  • Wenceslas Square: A vibrant shopping and entertainment district.

  • Petrin Hill & Tower: A scenic hilltop with panoramic views of the city.

  • Czech Beer Culture: Experience some of the world’s best pilsners in local breweries.

packages.overview:
1: Arrival in Cairo – Meet & greet by Travelxploria representative, transfer to hotel, check-in & briefing.

2: Cairo Tour – Visit Pyramids, Sphinx & Egyptian Museum.

3: Fly to Luxor – Explore West Bank (Valley of the Kings, Hatshepsut Temple) & East Bank (Karnak & Luxor Temples).

4: Embark Dahabiya Cruise – Visit Esna Temple & sail to El Kab.

5: Sailing to Edfu – Visit Edfu Temple & campfire dinner on a Nile island.

6: Visit Gebel El Silsila – Explore quarries, Kom Ombo Temple & enjoy onboard meals.

7: Visit Daraw – Explore camel market & sail towards Aswan.

8: Disembark in Aswan – Transfer to hotel & free day.

9: Fly back to Cairo – Transfer to hotel & overnight stay.

10: Cairo to Siwa via El Alamein – Visit WWII Museum & drive to Siwa Oasis.

11: Siwa Sightseeing – Explore Shali, Temple of Alexander, Amun Ra Temple, Mountain of the Dead & Cleopatra Spring.

12: Siwa Adventure – Visit Great Sand Sea, Bir Wahid, enjoy sandboarding & desert sunset.

13: Drive back to Cairo – Transfer & check-in at the hotel.

14: Final Departure – Transfer to Cairo International Airport.

Upon arrival at Cairo International Airport, a Travelxploria representative will meet and assist you with airport formalities before escorting you in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle to your hotel. Upon arrival, our representative will handle your check-in and provide you with a detailed briefing about your upcoming excursions, ensuring a seamless start to your journey.

After breakfast, Travelxploria's representative will accompany you on an unforgettable journey through ancient Egypt, starting with a visit to the iconic Pyramids. Explore the Great Pyramid of Cheops, the largest and only surviving wonder of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World, followed by the well-preserved Pyramid of Chephren and the Pyramid of Mycerinus. Marvel at the legendary Sphinx, a breathtaking structure carved from natural rock, with its lion’s body stretching 45 meters and paws extending 15 meters. Continue to the Egyptian Museum, where you will spend two hours discovering the world’s richest collection of ancient artifacts, including the fascinating treasures of King Tutankhamun, with his magnificent golden mask as the highlight.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Luxor","country":"Egypt","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Fly to Luxor - West Bank & East bank visits","day_summary":"

After breakfast, Travelxploria's representative will assist with check-out and transfer you to Cairo Airport for your flight to Luxor. Upon arrival, begin your exploration of the West Bank with a visit to the Valley of the Kings, where the tombs of ancient pharaohs lie, including the famous tomb of Tutankhamun (not included in the visit). Our expert guide will provide insightful explanations about the remarkable tombs and their history. Continue to the stunning Temple of Deir el-Bahari, dedicated to Queen Hatshepsut, followed by a visit to the towering Colossi of Memnon. After checking in at your Luxor hotel, set out to explore the Karnak Temple complex, the second-largest ancient religious site in the world after Angkor Wat. This vast complex, built over 2,000 years, features enormous pillars, obelisks, statues, and kiosks that will leave you in awe. Conclude the day with a visit to Luxor Temple, dedicated to the New Empire’s supreme deity, Amun. After an enriching day, return to your hotel for an overnight stay in Luxor.

After breakfast, Travelxploria's representative will assist with check-out and transfer you to Esna, located 50 km south, the home port of your luxurious Dahabiya. Embark on a memorable five-day cruise along the Nile from Esna to Aswan. Begin with a visit to the Esna Temple, followed by a leisurely walk through the vibrant local markets. Set sail to El Kab, the ancient town of Nekheb, where you will explore the remains of its historic temples and rock-cut tombs. As the journey continues, cruise towards a serene island, where the boat will anchor for the night. Enjoy a delightful dinner either on board or on the peaceful riverbanks of the Nile. Overnight stay on board the Dahabiya.

Cruise.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":" Saling to Edfu - El Fawaz","day_summary":"

After breakfast, Travelxploria's representative will guide you through the exploration of the rock temple and the remains of ancient monuments in the old quarries. As the riverbanks come to life with fishermen beginning their day, relax on the sundeck while the crew sails towards Edfu. Upon arrival, visit the remarkably well-preserved Temple of Horus, dedicated to the falcon god, where the inner walls are inscribed with ancient texts, resembling a library carved in stone. As the day comes to a close, sail to a tranquil Nile island and enjoy a delightful dinner around a campfire. Overnight stay on board the Dahabiya.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" Gebal EL Selsila - Kom Ombo","day_summary":"

While enjoying breakfast on board, Travelxploria's representative will ensure a smooth sail to Selselah Temple, where the Nile narrows between two mountain ranges, creating a breathtaking view. As large cruise ships cannot dock here, you will have the rare opportunity to explore this secluded site. Visit the small Temple of Horemheb and walk through the ancient sandstone quarries, where stones were once cut for Egypt’s most iconic temples. Take a break at a picturesque café to sip on tea and try a traditional shisha (waterpipe). Later, sail towards a scenic riverbank for a delightful lunch on board. In the afternoon, visit the fascinating Kom Ombo Temple, dedicated to the crocodile god Sobek and the falcon-headed Haroeris. End the day with a delicious dinner and overnight stay on board the Dahabiya.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Daraw - Aswan","day_summary":"

While enjoying breakfast on board, Travelxploria's representative ensures a smooth sail to the village of Daraw, once a bustling hub for camel traders journeying from Sudan after a forty-day trek through the Libyan desert. Take a guided walk through the village and its lively camel market, where you can witness the traditional trade still in practice. After this unique cultural experience, continue sailing towards Aswan, where you will spend the night onboard the Dahabiya, enjoying the serene beauty of the Nile.

Enjoy your last breakfast on board the Dahabiya as Travelxploria's representative arranges a smooth transfer to your hotel in Aswan. After check-in, take advantage of a free day to explore the city at your own pace or simply relax. Overnight stay in Aswan.

Upon reaching El Alamein on the Mediterranean coast, visit the renowned World War Museum to explore its historical exhibits. Enjoy a delicious seafood lunch at a local restaurant before continuing the scenic six-hour drive to Siwa Oasis. Upon arrival, check in at your hotel, relax, and later savor a delightful dinner before settling in for an overnight stay.

Ecovillages Siwa/1743164688064-Taziry Ecovillages Siwa.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Siwa sightseeing","day_summary":"

After an early breakfast at the hotel, embark on an exciting exploration of Siwa Oasis with Travelxploria's expert guide. Discover the fascinating Old Town of Shali, followed by a visit to the Temple of Alexander the Great, also known as the Temple of the Oracle. Explore the Temple of Amun Ra, famously known as the Temple of Um Ubeyda, and marvel at the historic tombs at the Mountain of the Dead (Jabal el Mawta). Enjoy a refreshing swim at Cleopatra Spring before heading to Fitnas Island to witness a breathtaking once-in-a-lifetime sunset view. After a day filled with adventure, return to the hotel for a delightful dinner and overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Siwa Full Day Tour","day_summary":"

After an early breakfast at the hotel, embark on another thrilling day of exploration in Siwa Oasis with Travelxploria's expert guide. Begin with a visit to the breathtaking Great Sand Sea, home to a stunning desert lake, and if lucky, catch a glimpse of elegant flamingo birds. Continue to Dakrour Mountain, known for its healing sand baths, before experiencing the thrill of Siwa sandboarding across the golden dunes. Relax in the rejuvenating waters of the famous hot spring, Bir Wahid, and later, witness another mesmerizing sunset over the Great Sand Sea while savoring traditional Bedouin tea. Return to the hotel for a delightful dinner and overnight stay.

packages.structure_date:
[{"city":"Nile Cruise","country":"Egypt","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":" Arrive Aswan Airport | Check in Cruise","day_summary":"

Upon arrival at Aswan Airport, our Travelxploria representative will warmly welcome you and ensure a seamless transfer to your luxurious Nile cruise. Enjoy a hassle-free check-in as you embark on an unforgettable journey through the heart of Egypt. Take some time to refresh and settle into your elegant cabin, where breathtaking views of the Nile await. Savor a delightful lunch, either a carefully curated set menu or an exquisite buffet. In the evening, relish a delicious dinner on board, with a variety of snacks or buffet options to suit your taste. Relax and unwind under the starry sky as your cruise gently sails along the tranquil waters. Overnight stay in Aswan, where history and luxury blend seamlessly to offer you an extraordinary experience.

Start your day with a delightful breakfast on board at 06:00 AM, prepared to fuel an exciting day of exploration. At 07:00 AM, our Travelxploria representative, along with an expert guide, will escort you to the remarkable High Dam, a modern engineering marvel, followed by a visit to the Philae Temple, dedicated to Goddess Isis, offering breathtaking views and ancient grandeur. Return to your cruise for a sumptuous international buffet lunch at 1:00 PM. In the afternoon, at 2:00 PM, embark on a guided tour of the Nubian Museum, where you’ll uncover the rich heritage and vibrant culture of Nubia. As evening descends, relish a Lebanese buffet dinner at 7:30 PM on board. At 8:00 PM, immerse yourself in the lively rhythms of a Nubian Party, celebrating traditional music and dance. Enjoy an overnight stay in Aswan, surrounded by the timeless beauty of the Nile.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Visit Kom Ombo temple","day_summary":"

Start your day with a delicious breakfast on board at 7:00 AM, enjoying the serene views of the Nile. At 12:30 PM, savor a Mediterranean buffet lunch as you sail towards Kom Ombo. Our Travelxploria representative, along with an expert guide, will accompany you at 4:30 PM for an enriching visit to the Kom Ombo Temple, an extraordinary twin temple dedicated to Sobek, the crocodile god, and Horus, the falcon-headed god. Discover fascinating ancient carvings and the unique crocodile mummies displayed at the on-site museum. Return to the cruise and indulge in a BBQ dinner at 7:30 PM as you continue your journey sailing towards Edfu. Enjoy a relaxing overnight stay in Edfu, embraced by the tranquil waters of the Nile.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Edfu","day_summary":"

Begin your day early with a delightful breakfast on board at 5:45 AM, preparing for a captivating journey. At 6:45 AM, our Travelxploria representative, along with an expert guide, will accompany you to the magnificent Edfu Temple, dedicated to the falcon god Horus, one of the best-preserved temples in Egypt. At 9:30 AM, set sail towards Luxor via Esna Lock, experiencing the marvel of Nile navigation. Enjoy a Mexican buffet lunch at 12:30 PM while soaking in the breathtaking river views. By 5:00 PM, embarkation for Luxor/Cairo clients takes place, ensuring a smooth transition for all travelers. Later, indulge in an Asian buffet dinner at 5:30 PM before settling in for a peaceful overnight stay in Luxor, where history and charm await your next adventure.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"West Bank Luxor","day_summary":"

Start your day with a hearty breakfast on board at 6:00 AM, preparing for an extraordinary journey through ancient history. At 7:00 AM, our Travelxploria representative, along with an experienced guide, will escort you to Luxor’s West Bank, where you will explore the awe-inspiring Valley of the Kings & Queens, the final resting place of Egypt’s mighty pharaohs. Visit the stunning Temple of Queen Hatshepsut (El Deir El Bahari), an architectural masterpiece carved into the cliffs. Return to the cruise for a light buffet lunch at 12:30 PM before continuing to the East Bank at 2:00 PM, where you will discover the grandeur of Karnak & Luxor Temples, showcasing Egypt’s ancient splendor. In the evening, relish a French buffet dinner at 7:30 PM, followed by an enchanting belly dancer show at 9:30 PM. Overnight stay in Luxor, immersed in the magic of the Nile.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Dendarah Temple","day_summary":"

Start your day with a delicious breakfast on board at 7:00 AM as your Travelxploria representative ensures a smooth sail to Qena. Enjoy the breathtaking views of the Nile as you cruise toward one of Egypt’s most well-preserved temples. Savor a flavorful Indian buffet lunch at 1:00 PM before embarking on a fascinating visit to the Dendara Temple at 2:00 PM, dedicated to the goddess Hathor, known for love and joy. After an insightful tour with your expert guide, return to the cruise at 4:00 PM and set sail toward Naga Hammadi. In the evening, indulge in a delicious BBQ dinner at 7:30 PM while enjoying the serene ambiance of the Nile. Overnight stay in Naga Hammadi, promising another day of incredible discoveries.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" Abydos Temple","day_summary":"

At 5:00 AM, set sail towards El Balyana via Abu Homar’s bridge & lock, as your Travelxploria representative ensures a seamless and comfortable journey. Enjoy a delightful breakfast on board at 7:00 AM, preparing you for a day of exploration. At 10:00 AM, embark on a guided tour of the Abydos Temple, one of the most significant religious sites in ancient Egypt, dedicated to Osiris, the god of the afterlife. Absorb the fascinating history before returning to the cruise for a relaxing sail to Sohag at 12:30 PM. Savor a classic English buffet lunch at 1:00 PM, followed by a leisurely afternoon onboard. As night falls, indulge in an authentic Oriental buffet dinner at 8:00 PM, followed by the lively Galabia Party at 9:00 PM, where you can experience traditional Egyptian culture. Overnight stay in Sohag, ensuring a restful night before the next adventure.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" Tawdrous Monastery","day_summary":"

At 3:50 AM, set sail from Sohag to Tel El Amarna, the historic city of Pharaoh Akhenaten, passing through Asyout’s lock under the seamless coordination of your Travelxploria representative. Wake up to a sumptuous breakfast on board at 8:00 AM, as the cruise continues its serene journey. By 1:00 PM, sail past the lock towards Tel El Amarna, where you’ll enjoy a delicious Italian buffet lunch onboard. At 2:30 PM, pause in front of the Prince Tawdrous Monastery, where your expert Travelxploria guide will share fascinating insights into the history and religious significance of this revered site. As the evening sets in, savor a BBQ dinner at 7:30 PM, enjoying the tranquil beauty of the Nile. Overnight stay in Tel El Amarna, ensuring a peaceful rest before the next adventure.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Tel El Amarna| Tuna Al gabal | Ashmunein","day_summary":"

At 5:30 AM, begin your day with a delightful breakfast on board, preparing for a day of historical exploration with your expert Travelxploria guide. At 6:45 AM, embark on a fascinating visit to the northern tombs of Tel El Amarna, followed by the Royal Tomb of Akhenaten, the Northern Palace, and the Small Temples of Aten, where your guide will bring to life the rich legacy of Pharaoh Akhenaten’s reign. Continue to the ancient sites of Ashmunein and Tuna El Gabal, uncovering Egypt’s mystical past. Return to the cruise for a light buffet lunch at 2:30 PM as you sail toward Minya. In the evening, enjoy a set-menu dinner at 7:00 PM, followed by a vibrant Folklore Party at 8:00 PM, celebrating the region’s cultural heritage. Overnight stay in Minya, ensuring a restful night before the next adventure.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Beni Hassan Tombs","day_summary":"

Start your day with a hearty breakfast on board at 6:00 AM, preparing for an immersive journey into ancient history with your expert Travelxploria guide. At 7:00 AM, set off for the remarkable Beni Hassan tombs, where you will explore the Tomb of Baqet III (BH15), Tomb of Khety (BH17), Tomb of Amenemhet (BH2), and Tomb of Khnumhotep II (BH3)—each adorned with vibrant murals depicting daily life in ancient Egypt. This excursion, approximately one hour from Minya dock, offers a two-hour guided exploration filled with captivating historical insights. Return to the cruise by 11:30 AM and set sail toward Beni Suef, enjoying a flavorful Moroccan buffet lunch at 12:30 PM. As evening falls, indulge in a delicious BBQ dinner at 7:30 PM, accompanied by a live singer for a delightful ambiance. Conclude the night with a fun Quiz Night at 9:00 PM, before an overnight stay in Beni Suef.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" Coptic Cairo","day_summary":"

As the cruise sails toward Cairo at 6:00 AM, begin your day with a sumptuous breakfast on board at 7:00 AM. Relax and soak in the breathtaking Nile views before indulging in a traditional Egyptian lunch at 1:00 PM. In the afternoon, join your expert Travelxploria guide at 2:00 PM for a captivating Coptic Cairo tour, where you will visit the Hanging Church, the Coptic Museum, and the Ben Ezra Synagogue, each offering a glimpse into Cairo’s rich religious heritage. Return to the cruise for a delightful dinner at 7:30 PM, followed by an enchanting Oriental Takht show at 8:00 PM, showcasing traditional Egyptian music. Enjoy a relaxing overnight stay in Cairo, preparing for more unforgettable experiences ahead.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Pyramids | Egyptian Museum","day_summary":"

Start your day with a delicious breakfast on board at 7:00 AM, preparing for an exciting adventure with your expert Travelxploria guide. At 8:00 AM, set out to explore the awe-inspiring Giza Pyramids and the Sphinx, marveling at these ancient wonders that have stood the test of time. Return to the cruise for a sumptuous seafood buffet lunch at 12:00 PM, re-energizing for the next chapter of your journey. At 1:30 PM, embark on a fascinating visit to the Egyptian Museum in Cairo, home to an incredible collection of artifacts, including the treasures of King Tutankhamun. After a day filled with history and discovery, unwind on board with an elegant flambé dinner at 7:30 PM, soaking in the charm of Cairo’s evening skyline. Overnight in Cairo, savoring the last moments of this extraordinary journey.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Farawell","day_summary":"

Start your final day with a hearty breakfast on board at 7:00 AM, savoring the last moments of your incredible journey. After breakfast, disembark and check out, where our dedicated Travelxploria representative will ensure a seamless and comfortable transfer to Cairo International Airport. As you bid farewell to Egypt, take with you cherished memories of breathtaking landmarks, rich history, and unparalleled hospitality. Our team at Travelxploria looks forward to welcoming you again for another unforgettable adventure. Safe travels.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Ferry","from":"Nile Cruise from Cairo ","to":"Cairo International Airport","splitStops":[]}}]}]}]

packages.overview:
• Arrival & City Views – Arrive in Kuala Lumpur, visit KL Tower Observatory for panoramic views, and explore the Chocolate Boutique.
  • KL Highlights & Genting Excursion – Guided city tour, visit Batu Caves, and enjoy thrilling rides at Skyworld Theme Park in Genting Highlands.
  • Putrajaya & Malacca Exploration – Orientation tour of Putrajaya, drive to Malacca, enjoy a scenic river cruise, and visit the Maritime Museum.
  • Journey to Singapore & Gardens by the Bay – Drive to Singapore, explore the city with a guided tour, and visit the stunning Gardens by the Bay.
  • Bird Park & Sentosa Island Adventure – Visit Mandai Bird Park, enjoy breathtaking views from MBS Sky Park, and take a cable car ride to Sentosa Island.
  • Universal Studios & S.E.A. Aquarium – Experience thrilling rides at Universal Studios and explore marine wonders at S.E.A. Aquarium.
  • Board the Genting Dream Cruise – Check out from the hotel and embark on the luxurious Genting Dream Cruise for an exciting sea journey.
  • Cruise Leisure & Entertainment – Enjoy world-class amenities, pools, gourmet dining, and entertainment on board.
  • Cruise Exploration & Relaxation – Continue indulging in the cruise’s activities, fine dining, and vibrant entertainment.
  • Departure – Disembark from the cruise and head to the airport, bidding farewell to an unforgettable journey.

As you touch down in Kuala Lumpur, our Travelxploria representative will warmly welcome you and ensure a smooth transfer to your first adventure. With our experienced tour guide leading the way, head straight to the KL Tower Observatory, where breathtaking panoramic views of the city skyline await. From this iconic vantage point, admire Kuala Lumpur’s dazzling mix of modern skyscrapers and historical landmarks. Next, indulge your senses at the Chocolate Boutique, where you can sample and shop for Malaysia’s finest handmade chocolates. Whether you prefer classic flavors or exotic local infusions, this stop promises a delightful treat. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff handling all logistics, your day is seamless and stress-free. After a fulfilling introduction to the city, relax and settle into your hotel, gearing up for the exciting journey ahead.

Damansara/1739451048296-Sofitel Kuala Lumpur Damansara.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Guided city tour of Kuala Lumpur ","day_summary":"

Embark on an unforgettable Half Day City Tour of Kuala Lumpur with Travelxploria’s expert representatives ensuring a seamless experience from start to finish. Our experienced tour guide will take you on a journey through the city’s rich cultural heritage and modern marvels, making every stop insightful and engaging. Capture stunning photos at the Petronas Twin Towers, King's Palace, National Monument, and the National Mosque, while learning fascinating stories behind these landmarks. Visit the Cocoa Centre, where you can explore Malaysia’s renowned chocolate industry and sample delicious treats. Our tour also takes you to the historic Independence Square, a symbol of Malaysia’s journey to freedom, where you can immerse yourself in the city's vibrant energy. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, seamless pick-up and drop-off services, and a carefully curated itinerary, this tour guarantees a hassle-free and enriching experience in Malaysia’s dynamic capital.

Start your day with an enriching orientation tour of Putrajaya, where our Travelxploria representative and experienced tour guide will introduce you to Malaysia’s administrative capital, famed for its grand architecture, serene lakes, and stunning bridges. Marvel at landmarks like the Putra Mosque and Perdana Putra before setting off on a scenic drive to Malacca, a city steeped in colonial history. Upon arrival, embark on a Malacca River Cruise, gliding past colorful heritage buildings, historic churches, and vibrant street art that tell tales of a bygone era. The journey continues with a visit to the Maritime Museum, where you’ll explore a life-sized replica of a Portuguese ship and learn about Malacca’s rich maritime history. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff ensuring a seamless experience, sit back, relax, and soak in the cultural wonders of the day before heading to your next adventure.

Kuala Lumpur to Singapore Begin your day with a guided city tour, led by a Travelxploria representative, to explore Singapore's iconic landmarks like the Singapore Flyer, the Civic District, and the Padang. After soaking in the sights, head to Chinatown, where you'll experience the vibrant cultural heart of Singapore, with opportunities to shop for souvenirs and visit the serene Buddha Tooth Relic Temple. Along the way, enjoy a delicious breakfast, carefully selected to energize you for the day ahead. Your Travelxploria guide will ensure you make the most of each stop, sharing insights into Singapore's rich history and traditions. The experience includes hotel pick-up and drop-off, providing a seamless, hassle-free journey throughout your tour.


Begin your day with a delicious breakfast, followed by a comfortable pick-up from your hotel with our Travelxploria guide. Explore the iconic Gardens by the Bay, a futuristic oasis blending nature and technology. Wander through the breathtaking Supertree Grove, marveling at the towering vertical gardens. Step into the climate-controlled wonders of the Flower Dome, showcasing global flora, and the mystical Cloud Forest, with its spectacular indoor waterfall. After an unforgettable experience, we’ll ensure a smooth drop-off back to your hotel.

Step into the climate-controlled wonders of the Flower Dome, showcasing global flora, and the mystical Cloud Forest, with its spectacular indoor waterfall. After an unforgettable experience, we’ll ensure a smooth drop-off back to your hotel.

Join Travelxploria for an enchanting journey to Bird Paradise Singapore, where nature comes alive! Our courteous representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Led by our expert guide, explore this breathtaking aviary teeming with thousands of exotic birds. Witness the vibrant macaws, graceful flamingos, and mighty eagles in beautifully crafted habitats. Engage in interactive feeding sessions and be amazed by spectacular bird shows. After a day filled with nature’s melodies and stunning sights, sit back and unwind as we drop you safely back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and memorable experience.

A visit to Marina Bay is incomplete without experiencing the SkyPark Observation Deck, offering stunning views 57 stories above Singapore. Begin your day with a delightful breakfast before our expert Travelxploria guide picks you up from your hotel. At the SkyPark, indulge in a luxurious wine-and-dine experience, enjoy the breathtaking skyline, and shop for exclusive souvenirs while gazing at the world’s largest infinity pool. With our convenient hotel pickup and drop-off, you can relax and soak in the unforgettable sights of Singapore’s iconic Marina Bay.

On your visit to Sentosa Island, join Travelxploria for a thrilling ride on the iconic cable car that connects Faber Peak to the island. Enjoy a 30-minute journey offering 360-degree views of Singapore’s lush forests, impressive skyscrapers, and serene sandy beaches as you travel nearly 5 kilometers. Travelxploria’s representative will be with you throughout the experience, ensuring your comfort and providing fascinating insights along the way. The trip includes convenient pick-up from your hotel, so you can relax and enjoy the seamless start to your adventure. Once you’ve taken in the stunning sights from the cable car, you’ll be dropped off back at your hotel, completing the perfect, hassle-free experience. This journey offers the ideal mix of nature and cityscape, all guided by a Travelxploria expert.

Universal Studios Singapore is a world-class theme park located on Sentosa Island, offering a thrilling experience with seven uniquely themed zones, including Hollywood, Sci-Fi City, Jurassic Park, and Far Far Away. Visitors can enjoy exciting rides like Transformers: The Ride and Battlestar Galactica, immersive 4D shows, live entertainment, and meet iconic movie characters. Perfect for all ages, it’s a must-visit destination for adventure, fun, and family-friendly attractions. Enjoy the convenience of hotel pickup and drop-off, along with a knowledgeable Travelxploria guide to ensure a smooth and memorable experience throughout your visit.​

After a delightful breakfast, a friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up from your hotel. Embark on an unforgettable journey to the S.E.A. Aquarium on Sentosa, one of the world’s largest aquariums, housing over 100,000 marine animals across 45 habitats. Explore the mesmerizing marine life and, during the holiday season, enjoy the festive Splashtacular Christmas with thrilling waterslides and a relaxing lazy river experience. After a day of adventure, enjoy a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.

packages.overview: Embark on an unforgettable Southeast Asian adventure with Travelxploria, beginning in Kuala Lumpur where you’ll marvel at Putrajaya’s modern splendor and the towering Petronas Twin Towers. Ascend to the cool heights of Genting Highlands for entertainment, shopping, and a thrilling cable car ride before diving into a full day of water slides and amusement-packed fun at Sunway Lagoon. Continue your city discoveries with a guided Kuala Lumpur tour, then journey to vibrant Singapore to wander Marina Bay’s waterfront, plunge into blockbuster thrills at Universal Studios, and unwind on Sentosa Island—complete with beaches, iconic attractions, and the mesmerizing Wings of Time show. Cap off your journey with a curated Singapore city tour, board a luxury cruise for days of scenic ocean relaxation and onboard delights, and finally disembark for your seamless transfer to Changi Airport—courtesy of Travelxploria’s meticulous planning and seamless service.

Upon your arrival in Kuala Lumpur, our Travelxploria representative will be there to warmly welcome you. With our experienced tour guide and best on-ground support staff, enjoy a seamless transfer to your hotel, where you can unwind after your journey. Once refreshed, embark on an exciting tour of Putrajaya, Malaysia’s stunning administrative capital, known for its grand architecture and serene landscapes. Stroll through its beautifully designed bridges, waterfront parks, and iconic structures. Later, head to the world-famous Petronas Twin Towers for a breathtaking photo stop, capturing the towering beauty of this architectural marvel. Whether it’s the city’s modern skyline or its cultural charm, our expert team ensures a smooth, hassle-free experience from arrival to exploration. As the evening unfolds, immerse yourself in Kuala Lumpur’s vibrant ambiance before returning to your hotel, setting the perfect tone for the adventures ahead.

Start your day with a seamless pick-up as our Travelxploria representative and experienced tour guide welcome you for a breathtaking journey to Genting Highlands. Sit back and enjoy the scenic drive as we leave behind the bustling streets of Kuala Lumpur, ascending into the cool, misty heights of Malaysia’s premier hill resort. With the best on-ground support staff ensuring a smooth experience, arrive at the base station for an unforgettable Awana Skyway cable car ride, offering panoramic views of the lush rainforest below.

Once at the top, immerse yourself in a world of entertainment—try your luck at the famous casino, explore the indoor theme parks, or indulge in a shopping spree at Genting Premium Outlets. Whether you seek adventure or relaxation, our team ensures a hassle-free experience, making this highland retreat a perfect blend of thrill and tranquility.

Gear up for an action-packed day as our Travelxploria representative and experienced tour guide ensure a seamless pick-up, taking you to Malaysia’s ultimate theme park—Sunway Lagoon. With the best on-ground support staff handling every detail, you can focus on the fun from the moment you arrive.

Dive into adventure at the Water Park, where exhilarating slides and wave pools promise endless thrills. Experience heart-pounding rides at the Amusement Park, encounter exotic animals at the Wildlife Park, and conquer the spooky zones at Scream Park. For adrenaline junkies, the Extreme Park offers bungee jumping and ATV rides.

Whether you're riding the Vuvuzela, Asia’s largest water ride, or simply floating along the lazy river, Sunway Lagoon guarantees fun for all ages. As the sun sets, our team ensures a smooth drop-off, leaving you with memories of a truly spectacular day.

Enjoy the convenience of hotel pickup and drop-off, along with a knowledgeable Travelxploria guide to ensure a smooth and memorable experience throughout your visit.​

After a delightful breakfast, a friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up from your hotel. Embark on an unforgettable journey to the S.E.A. Aquarium on Sentosa, one of the world’s largest aquariums, housing over 100,000 marine animals across 45 habitats. Explore the mesmerizing marine life and, during the holiday season, enjoy the festive Splashtacular Christmas with thrilling waterslides and a relaxing lazy river experience. After a day of adventure, enjoy a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.

After a delightful breakfast, a Travelxploria representative will pick you up from your hotel and guide you to the captivating Wings of Time show. Following your exploration of the ocean depths at S.E.A. Aquarium, get ready for a stunning seaside performance filled with lasers, pyrotechnics, water fountains, and 3D mapping. The show weaves an epic tale of a mythical bird and its companions, traveling through time across mesmerizing landscapes. After this unforgettable experience, you’ll be comfortably dropped off at your hotel to end your day seamlessly.

Start your day with a captivating half-day city tour, guided by our Travelxploria representative and experienced tour guide, ensuring you experience the best of Singapore with insightful commentary and seamless navigation. Marvel at the architectural brilliance of Marina Bay Sands, stroll through the lush beauty of Gardens by the Bay, and capture the perfect photo at the iconic Merlion—a true symbol of the Lion City.

As the afternoon unfolds, step aboard a scenic cruise, where our best on-ground support staff ensures a smooth and luxurious experience. Glide along Singapore’s coastline, taking in breathtaking views of the skyline and nearby islands. As the sun sets, the evening is yours to embrace—whether it’s indulging in waterfront dining, exploring vibrant nightlife, or unwinding under the city lights, Travelxploria guarantees a seamless and memorable journey.

Whether you choose to take a refreshing dip in the on-board pools, savor gourmet delights at world-class restaurants, or enjoy live entertainment, every moment is crafted for your comfort.

With the expertise of our experienced tour guide, explore the many activities offered by the cruise—be it a rejuvenating spa session, a thrilling sports deck challenge, or simply lounging on the sun-kissed deck, taking in the breathtaking ocean views. Our best on-ground support staff is always at your service, ensuring your every need is met with ease. ","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure","day_summary":"

After a delightful breakfast, it's time to bid farewell to the incredible journey that took you through the wonders of Malaysia and Singapore. With Travelxploria’s representative ensuring a smooth and stress-free departure, you will be seamlessly transferred to Singapore Changi Airport. Our experienced tour guide and best on-ground support staff will be there to assist you, making sure every last detail is taken care of, allowing you to focus on cherishing the memories you've made.

From the bustling streets of Kuala Lumpur to the thrills of Genting Highlands, the excitement of Sentosa, and the luxury of your cruise experience, each moment has been carefully curated to give you an unparalleled adventure. As you board your flight home, take a moment to reflect on the breathtaking sights, the cultural experiences, and the joy-filled moments that will stay with you forever. Safe travels, and we look forward to welcoming you on another journey soon.

packages.overview: Embark on an exhilarating journey with Travelxploria, touching down in Kuala Lumpur where you’ll be whisked to your hotel to unwind before diving into the city’s vibrant street life. Venture up to Genting Highlands for theme-park thrills, boutique shopping, and sweeping mountain vistas, then return to explore Kuala Lumpur’s cultural crown jewels—marvel at the Petronas Twin Towers, ascend the sacred Batu Caves, and stroll through historic neighborhoods. Next, cross into Singapore by air or road and discover the glittering waterfront of Marina Bay before delving into the city’s heart on a guided tour of Merlion Park, Chinatown, and other iconic landmarks. Cap off your adventure with heart-pounding rides and movie-magic attractions at Universal Studios Singapore, then savor final moments of shopping and relaxation before Travelxploria ensures your seamless departure home.

Get ready for an exhilarating journey to Genting Highlands, where Travelxploria’s representative ensures a seamless pick-up from your hotel. As you ascend the cool, misty mountains, our experienced tour guide shares fascinating insights into this vibrant hill resort. Feel the thrill as you board the one-way cable car, gliding over lush rainforests with breathtaking panoramic views. Once at the top, immerse yourself in the excitement of the casinos, theme parks, and world-class shopping experiences. Whether you seek adventure or relaxation, Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff is always ready to assist, ensuring a hassle-free experience. On your way back, make a brief stop at the sacred Batu Caves, where you can climb the 272 steps to witness the awe-inspiring golden statue of Lord Murugan. With seamless transfers and a perfectly curated itinerary, this day trip guarantees a magical blend of nature, culture, and entertainment.

Embark on an unforgettable Half Day City Tour of Kuala Lumpur with Travelxploria’s expert representatives ensuring a seamless experience from start to finish. Our experienced tour guide will take you on a journey through the city’s rich cultural heritage and modern marvels, making every stop insightful and engaging. Capture stunning photos at the Petronas Twin Towers, King's Palace, National Monument, and the National Mosque, while learning fascinating stories behind these landmarks. Visit the Cocoa Centre, where you can explore Malaysia’s renowned chocolate industry and sample delicious treats. Our tour also takes you to the historic Independence Square, a symbol of Malaysia’s journey to freedom, where you can immerse yourself in the city's vibrant energy. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, seamless pick-up and drop-off services, and a carefully curated itinerary, this tour guarantees a hassle-free and enriching experience in Malaysia’s dynamic capital.

packages.package_name: From Canals to Castles: Amsterdam, Berlin & Prague
packages.overview:
Amsterdam – The City of Canals & Culture

  • Canal Cruises: Discover Amsterdam’s charm through scenic waterways.

  • Rijksmuseum & Van Gogh Museum: Home to Dutch masterpieces and world-famous art.

  • Anne Frank House: A poignant historical site dedicated to Anne Frank’s diary.

  • Dam Square & Royal Palace: A lively square with stunning architecture and cultural events.

  • Red Light District & Coffee Shops: A unique and liberal side of Amsterdam’s nightlife.

  • Tulip Gardens (Keukenhof): A seasonal spectacle of vibrant tulip fields.

Berlin – The Historic & Hip Capital of Germany

  • Brandenburg Gate: An iconic landmark symbolizing German unity.

  • Berlin Wall & East Side Gallery: A historic reminder turned into a vibrant art display.

  • Reichstag Building: A must-visit for history and panoramic city views.

  • Museum Island: A UNESCO-listed cultural hub with world-class museums.

  • Checkpoint Charlie: A famous Cold War site connecting East and West Berlin.

  • Alexanderplatz & Berlin TV Tower: A bustling square with breathtaking city views.

  • Kreuzberg & Nightlife: Trendy neighborhoods with lively clubs, bars, and street art.

Prague – The Fairytale City of Europe

  • Prague Castle & St. Vitus Cathedral: The world’s largest ancient castle with Gothic grandeur.

  • Charles Bridge: A historic bridge offering stunning views of the Vltava River.

  • Old Town Square & Astronomical Clock: A medieval square buzzing with history and culture.

  • Wenceslas Square: A vibrant shopping and entertainment district.

  • Petrin Hill & Tower: A scenic hilltop with panoramic views of the city.

  • Czech Beer Culture: Experience some of the world’s best pilsners in local breweries.

overview:
Journeys of a Lifetime – Under 1,00,000 with Travelxploria

Not all treasure is buried—some of it is experienced. And with Travelxploria’s unforgettable travel experiences under 1,00,000, your next adventure is rich in stories, not in cost. Imagine standing before towering monuments carved from stone and legend, wandering through golden deserts under starlit skies, or listening to prayers echo through centuries-old domes at sunset.

This is travel for the soul—where ancient civilizations whisper through temple walls, where spice-laden air fills bustling souks, where mountain winds carry silence and serenity alike. From sailing across sapphire seas to soaking in onsen-like hot springs, from timeless ruins to futuristic skylines, every itinerary is layered with the kind of awe money can’t buy—but yours, all within reach.

As your Best Travel Agency and globally recognized Best International Tour Operator, Travelxploria goes beyond just taking you places—we craft a mood, a memory, a moment that stays. Each curated Best Tour Package under ₹1,00,000 blends comfort with discovery, aesthetics with authenticity. Think sunrise over timeless ruins, moonlit dinners by the water, hammam rituals in desert towns, and countryside rides where time seems to pause.

Whether you're chasing romance, cultural depth, or multi-country expeditions with your loved ones, our Best Honeymoon Planner and Best Family Package options ensure your travel story is as unique as you are.
